title: Weekly Concept Deadline
description: Swipe a rooftop editor between lanes to keep the latest weekly concept issue intact while chasing risky bonus notes for a bigger score.

howToPlayJson.title: Weekly Concept Deadline
howToPlayJson.objective: Survive a 3-minute delivery run by dodging incoming rooftop hazards, grabbing glowing concept notes, and building the highest score before the paper stack is destroyed.

controls.outcome: The editor cart snaps to the next rooftop lane to avoid hazards.
A short burst moves the cart forward through tight hazard patterns.
Bank the current combo into a temporary score shield, but reset the multiplier.

steps: Start with three paper hearts and a x1 multiplier.
Hazards stream down the rooftop lanes: drones, billboards, loose vents, and red-ink storms.
Swipe between lanes to survive while collecting floating concept notes placed close to danger lines.
Every note collected without taking damage increases the multiplier; grazing hazards fills a risk meter faster.
Waves speed up every 30 seconds, mix patterns more aggressively, and end when all hearts are lost.
howToPlayJson.scoring: Score comes from survival distance plus collected concept notes. Consecutive notes raise a multiplier up to x8. Using the two-finger bank converts the current multiplier into a brief shield burst for safer high-score piv
tips: Stay near the center lane so late wave patterns leave you two escape routes.
Grab concept notes only when they extend an escape path, not when they trap you against a wall.
Bank a high multiplier right before dense waves if survival matters more than greed.
Use the upward burst sparingly; it saves runs, but mistiming it can place you inside the next pattern.
